hero.subtitle: Templates, guides, and Claude Code integration patterns for the JavaScript ecosystem — so you go from blank page to shipped feature without the usual page-blanche paralysis.

loop.heading: Three files. One source of truth.

spec.title: The what
spec.b2: 8 canonical sections in a fixed order
spec.b3: Every AC is testable by something concrete

plan.title: The how
plan.tagline: Stack choices, architecture, data contracts, security.
plan.b1: Argues every non-trivial decision in one sentence
plan.b2: Makes trade-offs explicit — no hidden assumptions
plan.b3: Evolves with the project (unlike the spec)

tasks.title: The steps
tasks.tagline: Atomic, verifiable, traceable back to an AC.
tasks.b1: Each task is completable in ≤ 30 minutes
tasks.b3: This is what you hand to Claude Code

personas.heading: Three kinds of people ship faster with this.

solo.title: Solo devs
solo.lead: Kill the page-blanche paralysis on every new project.

team.title: Tech leads
team.lead: Give your team a shared language for AI-paired work.

trainer.title: Trainers & consultants
trainer.lead: Reusable material for workshops and client engagements.

stats.heading: Why teams stick with SDD.
stats.s1Hint: spec, plan, tasks — no more, no less.
stats.s2Hint: Skip any and you've skipped the thinking.
stats.s3Hint: Anything bigger gets split. No exceptions.
stats.s4Hint: This site was built from its own specs.

bigcta.heading: Stop arguing with a blank page.
bigcta.subtitle: Copy the templates, write your first spec in 20 minutes, hand it to Claude Code, ship.
